title: bromus eximius subsp. robustus
intro: Bromus eximius subsp. robustus, also known as robust brome or robust bromegrass, is a subspecies of grass native to the mountainous regions of North America. It is a hardy perennial grass that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Bromus eximius subsp. robustus include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in a convenient and accessible way.
